inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: The amount of money already invested or saved at the beginning.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount of money already invested or saved at the beginning.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başlangıçta yatırılan veya biriktirilen para miktarı.

inputs.label: Annual Contribution
inputs.businessContext: The amount of money added to the investment each year.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount of money added to the investment each year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her yıl yatırıma eklenen para miktarı.

inputs.label: Number of Years
inputs.businessContext: The total time the money is invested for.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total time the money is invested for.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: The expected annual rate of return on the investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: The expected annual rate of return on the investment.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of times the interest is compounded per year (e.g., 12 for monthly).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of times the interest is compounded per year (e.g., 12 for monthly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık bileşik faiz dönemi sayısı (örneğin aylık için 12).
